question: Summer in Singapore is ________ hotter than in England.
Choose the correct word: The price difference between the two flats was only ________ — just 20 dinars.
A person who works while travelling from place to place is called a ________.
Choose the correct phrasal verb: The freezer ________ and started leaking water.
A room described as ________ is small but arranged so that everything fits neatly into the available space.

Read the passage and answer the question.

'Could you live in a home that is only 37 square metres in size? That is the size of a so-called tiny home, which has become a big craze in some parts of the world, giving rise to a new social trend: the tiny house movement. These compact properties have become more popular as people recognise the benefits of living small.'

What does the word 'craze' mean in this context?
According to the reading passage, living in a tiny home forces you to ________.
choices: get rid of your excess possessions

question: Choose the correct modal verb: You ________ wear a seatbelt in a car. It's the law.
Which sentence uses 'have to' correctly?
choices: I have to want to go to the gym.
My teacher told me I have to submit the essay tomorrow.
You have to not park here.
She have to finish her work.

question: Choose the correct article: ________ Eiffel Tower is one of the most visited landmarks in the world.
Fill in the blank with the correct phrasal verb: I ________ this old photo album while cleaning the attic.
Choose the correct word: The city of Tokyo is one of the most ________ cities in the world, with millions of people living close together.
Fill in the blank: Students ________ use their phones during the exam. It is strictly prohibited.
According to the reading passage, which country is described as masters in the art of saving space?
Choose the correct form: She ________ picking up the language within just two months.
Fill in the blank: Would you prefer to work from home or in a ________ space?
Choose the correct word to complete the sentence: You should ________ your dishcloth every week as it gets full of bacteria.
Fill in the blank with the correct article: I go to ________ school every day. (referring to the institution)
According to the reading, the NASA-funded experiment habitat was located ________.
choices: on the slopes of a volcano in the Pacific Ocean
on the surface of the moon

question: Choose the correct modal: Only local residents are ________ to park in the streets here.
Fill in the blank: The old sofa is broken. We need to ________ it.
Which phrasal verb means 'to decorate or renovate a place'?
Choose the correct option: In the NASA experiment, six crew members shared a space ________ 11 metres in diameter.
Fill in the blank: ________ the water off the kitchen floor after the freezer leaked.
Choose the correct form: According to the rules, you ________ leave food behind when you check out.
What does 'put down roots' mean?
choices: to settle permanently in a place

question: Fill in the blank: England is ________ as hot as Singapore in summer.
Choose the correct article: She is ________ engineer.
According to Professor Ellen Pader, one major benefit of sharing space with others is that you ________.
Fill in the blank: The freezer ________ and all the food inside melted.
Choose the correct word: The apartment was so ________ that we could barely move around.
Fill in the blank: He ________ play chess better than anyone I knew when he was young. (past ability)
In report writing, which phrase is used to introduce the aim of the report?
choices: The aim of this report is to...

question: Choose the correct option: Switch ________ the light when you leave the room.
Fill in the blank: Littering is ________ everywhere in Sweden, and if caught you will pay a fine.
Choose the correct form: My parents ________ find a nice apartment after months of searching. (specific past achievement)
According to the reading, the experiment showed that people in confined spaces get on better when they ________.
choices: spend more time together rather than retreating to private space

question: Fill in the blank: You are ________ to sort your recycling carefully. It is the law.
Choose the correct article: I live near ________ River Thames which flows through London.
Fill in the blank: The report is ________ on a survey of 50 students.
